titleStmt.title: SII 16.158: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 158. (A.R. No. 669 of 1922.) PAṬṆAM, KADIRI TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a small rock lying behind the central shrine in the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 146[9], Plavaṅga, Śrāvaṇa ba. 8, corresponding to 1547 A.D., August 8, (Monday).

It registers the gifts of lands made to Saṅkīrtanam Kēśavayya, Sudarśanam Vōbuḷayya and Kāluva Kṛishṇayya in the village Pātarlapalle by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla Achyutarāju, son of Abbarāju-Vōbuḷarāju. The village Pātarlapalle is said to have been included in the Paṭuvaguḷḷa-sīma and given as uṁbaḷi to the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1469 Agunēṁṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8 lū śrī
madrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśi
vadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnaśiṁhvāsanārū
ḍhulai pṛthivini sakalasāmrājyamu cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla ni¨rbhayanātha niśśaṁkuṁḍaina A
bbarāju vōbuḷarājugāri komāruḍu Acyutarājugāru saṁ
kī¨rtana kēśavayya suda¨rśanaṁ vōbaḷayya kāluva kriṣṇayyagāriki Icci
na bhūdānadha¨rmaśāsanamu guruvarājayyavārū māku vuṁbaḷiki bāliṁ
ccina paṭuvaguḷla śīmalōnikicellē pāta¨rllapalligramānanu kadiri śrī nṛśiṁha
dēvuni saṁnnidhini śrījayaṁttipuṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōśiyiccina
ceruvu venakanū śrīraṁgganātani tumakālvanū vaka
saṁkī¨rtana kēsuvayyaku ¿3 suda¨rśanamu vōbuḷayyagā
rki ¿2 kāluva kriṣṇayyagārki ¿2 nu ja 3 ki kha 0 . 2 Akṣa
rālānu Ēḍudūmeṁḍu Istimi mī putrapavutrapāraṁ
paryaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāIgānu Anubhaviṁcēdi
yiṁduku yavaru tappinanū vāraṇāsilōnu
gōbrāṁhmala vadhiIṁccina pāpāna bōvu
vārū .
Digital edition of SII 16.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
